info.description: Stripe Checkout button bound to a Programme entry's slug. Use this in a Page Builder page that needs to sell a programme (REGULATED sales page, etc.) — the button reads the price and grants flag from the matching Programme entry.

programme_slug.description: Slug of the Programme entry this button sells (must match exactly). Example: 'regulated' for the REGULATED programme. Anna's Programme entries live under Work · Programme.

label.description: Button text. Example: 'Yes, I want in', 'Step inside REGULATED'. Keep short.

secondary_text.description: Optional italic line under the button. Example: 'Pay what you feel · From £5'. Leave blank to hide.

anchor_id.description: Optional HTML id for this section so other CTAs on the page can jump to it. Example: 'join' lets a button with href '#join' scroll here. Lowercase only, no spaces.

style.description: Optional background colour, padding for this section.
